content: recien vi que pusieron un video en el canal xd
otra buena noticia

守密人，
        感謝大家對《忘卻前夜》的喜愛，和對周邊製品的關注~我們希望和守密人討論未來可能的選品和方向。其中可能出現一些有爭議的周邊類型，我們一定會謹慎地篩選。對於討論過程中引起到守密人的不適，我們也感到十分抱歉！
        另外，可以小小透露一下~我們當前的周邊計劃將以「美術設定集優先」。除此之外，在週年紀念活動中掉落的「彌薩格週年紀念周邊禮盒」，也包含了許多大家提到希望獲得的周邊類型！
        除此以外，歡迎大家在此討論希望推出的周邊形式~我們一定會聽取大家的建議，努力為大家帶來高品質的周邊產品喔！

Secret Keepers.
        Thank you all for your love for "The Night Before Oblivion" (Morimens) and your interest in the peripheral productions~ We would like to discuss possible future selections and directions with the Keeper of Secrets. There may be some controversial peripheral types, but we will be careful in selecting them. We apologize for any discomfort caused to the guardians during the discussion!
        In addition, we would like to disclose that our current peripheral program will give priority to the "Art Set". In addition to that, the "Misagh Anniversary Peripheral Gift Box" that dropped during the anniversary event contains many of the types of peripherals that you've mentioned that you'd like to get!
        Please feel free to discuss the types of peripherals you would like to see released here, and we'll be sure to listen to your suggestions and work hard to bring you high-quality peripheral products!
